region: offer-specific (global, EU multi-region, or European regional endpoint)
method: Live scrape of the official Vertex AI / Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform pricing page, cross-checked against the 2026-07-10 model, endpoint, data-residency, and lifecycle documentation. This file contains 56 current text-LLM offer rows: Global and EU routes are separate whenever price or residency differs. Retired Gemini 2.0 Flash variants are excluded. Gemini 3.5 Flash and 3.1 Flash-Lite use documented eu Standard PayGo routes plus cheaper Global routes; Gemini 2.5 Pro/Flash/Flash-Lite retain Global routes and add same-price EU-resident routes. Claude models with EU pricing also retain their cheaper Global offers. Global endpoints have no processing-location guarantee. Gemini Omni Flash Preview is included as a current text-in/text-out multimodal model. Mistral Medium 3, Mistral Small 3.1 and Codestral 2 use documented EU-hosted europe-west4 routes.

models.notes: Preview. Standard <=200K tier; >200K is $4/$18. Current Standard PayGo documentation exposes no EU-resident route, so this remains Global and does not qualify for EU-only filtering. Cached input $0.20 (<=200K), $0.40 (>200K).
Global Standard PayGo price. Global processing location is uncontrolled. The separate EU route is $1.65/$9.90. Cached input $0.15.

EU multi-region Standard PayGo price, in effect from 2026-07-01; ML processing remains in the EU. Global is $1.50/$9.00. Cached input $0.165. From Gemini 3.5, function declarations count as input tokens.
Preview (labeled 'Gemini 3 Flash Preview'). Text/image/video input; audio input is $1/1M. No non-global surcharge shown; Global applies. Cached input $0.05 (text/image/video).
Global Standard PayGo price. Global processing location is uncontrolled. The separate EU route is $0.275/$1.65. Cached input $0.025.
